understanding.goal_understanding: Get any pushable object—the selected controllable piece or any block—to reach or exceed the target x-coordinate specified in level.target_x, winning when at least one does so before exhausting the step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the selected piece exactly one STEP (3 pixels) in the chosen direction; if a pushable object is adjacent in that direction, it gets pushed along by one STEP. Walls and boundaries block movement, with hints from movement.{direction}_blocked, but actual outcomes must be tested as some walls may differ for direct movement versus pushing objects against them. SELECT switches control to another object by its id.

history.summary: Turn 1: MOVE_RIGHT | Push the adjacent block 'pb' right by moving right; if successful, pb reaches x=6 and wins, otherwise observe the wall interaction.
history.reasoning: Push the adjacent block 'pb' right by moving right; if successful, pb reaches x=6 and wins, otherwise observe the wall interaction.
